commands.reload.description: Reload Custom Chest Size config.json without restarting the game.
config.clamped: {{fieldName}} was set to {{value}}, so it was clamped to {{clamped}}.
gmcm.columns.name: Columns
gmcm.rows.name: Rows
gmcm.xOffset.name: X offset
gmcm.yOffset.name: Y offset
gmcm.regularChest.title: Regular chest
gmcm.regularChest.columns.tooltip: How many slots each row has in a regular chest.
gmcm.regularChest.rows.tooltip: How many rows a regular chest has.
gmcm.bigChest.title: Big chest
gmcm.bigChest.columns.tooltip: How many slots each row has in a big chest.
gmcm.bigChest.rows.tooltip: How many rows a big chest has.
gmcm.stoneChest.title: Stone chest
gmcm.stoneChest.columns.tooltip: How many slots each row has in a stone chest.
gmcm.stoneChest.rows.tooltip: How many rows a stone chest has.
gmcm.bigStoneChest.title: Big stone chest
gmcm.bigStoneChest.columns.tooltip: How many slots each row has in a big stone chest.
gmcm.bigStoneChest.rows.tooltip: How many rows a big stone chest has.
gmcm.fridge.title: Fridge
gmcm.fridge.columns.tooltip: How many slots each row has in the farmhouse fridge.
gmcm.fridge.rows.tooltip: How many rows the farmhouse fridge has.
gmcm.miniFridge.title: Mini-fridge
gmcm.miniFridge.columns.tooltip: How many slots each row has in a mini-fridge.
gmcm.miniFridge.rows.tooltip: How many rows a mini-fridge has.
gmcm.junimoChest.title: Junimo chest
gmcm.junimoChest.columns.tooltip: How many slots each row has in a junimo chest.
gmcm.junimoChest.rows.tooltip: How many rows a junimo chest has.
gmcm.junimoHut.title: Junimo Hut
gmcm.junimoHut.tooltip: Configure Junimo Hut output storage size.
gmcm.junimoHut.columns.tooltip: How many slots each row has in a Junimo Hut output chest.
gmcm.junimoHut.rows.tooltip: How many rows a Junimo Hut output chest has.
gmcm.autoGrabber.title: Auto-Grabber
gmcm.autoGrabber.columns.tooltip: How many slots each row has in an auto-grabber.
gmcm.autoGrabber.rows.tooltip: How many rows an auto-grabber has.
gmcm.layoutTuning.title: Layout tuning
gmcm.layoutTuning.tooltip: Use these offsets to tune menu backgrounds in-game. Slot positions stay unchanged unless noted.
Adds or removes height from the chest background only.
gmcm.layoutTuning.inventoryGap.name: Inventory gap
gmcm.layoutTuning.inventoryGap.tooltip: Moves the lower inventory panel background closer to or farther from the chest.
gmcm.layoutTuning.inventoryBackgroundTop: Extends the lower background upward from the inventory slots.
gmcm.layoutTuning.inventoryBackgroundBot: Extends the lower background downward from the inventory slots.
gmcm.layoutTuning.colorPickerX.name: Color picker X
gmcm.layoutTuning.colorPickerX.tooltip: Moves the opened chest color picker left or right relative to the resized chest.
gmcm.layoutTuning.colorPickerY.name: Color picker Y
gmcm.layoutTuning.colorPickerY.tooltip: Moves the opened chest color picker up or down relative to the resized chest.
gmcm.compatibility.page.tooltip: Configure compatibility offsets for other mods.
gmcm.compatibility.chestsAnywhere.title: Chests Anywhere
gmcm.compatibility.chestsAnywhere.toolti: These offsets move Chests Anywhere's chest overlay widgets when that mod is installed.
gmcm.compatibility.chestsAnywhere.x.name: CA widget X
gmcm.compatibility.chestsAnywhere.x.tool: Moves the Chests Anywhere overlay widgets left or right.
gmcm.compatibility.chestsAnywhere.y.name: CA widget Y
gmcm.compatibility.chestsAnywhere.y.tool: Moves the Chests Anywhere overlay widgets up or down.
gmcm.compatibility.unlimitedStorage.tool: These offsets move Unlimited Storage's search field when that mod is installed.
gmcm.compatibility.unlimitedStorage.sear: Moves Unlimited Storage's search field left or right.
Moves Unlimited Storage's search field up or down.
Extends or shrinks the left side of Unlimited Storage's search field.
Extends or shrinks the right side of Unlimited Storage's search field.
gmcm.compatibility.convenientChests.tool: These offsets move Convenient Chests' Categorize and Stash buttons when that mod is installed.
gmcm.compatibility.convenientChests.x.to: Moves Convenient Chests' button row left or right.
gmcm.compatibility.convenientChests.y.to: Moves Convenient Chests' button row and category popup up or down.
gmcm.compatibility.categorizeChests.tool: These offsets move Categorize Chests' Categorize and Stash buttons when that mod is installed.
gmcm.compatibility.categorizeChests.x.to: Moves Categorize Chests' button row left or right.
gmcm.compatibility.categorizeChests.y.to: Moves Categorize Chests' button row and category popup up or down.
gmcm.compatibility.remoteFridgeStorage.t: These offsets move Remote Fridge Storage's fridge icon when that mod is installed.
gmcm.compatibility.remoteFridgeStorage.x: Moves the Remote Fridge Storage icon left or right.
gmcm.compatibility.remoteFridgeStorage.y: Moves the Remote Fridge Storage icon up or down.
gmcm.extraFeatures.page.tooltip: Additional features like chest UI tinting.
gmcm.extraFeatures.chestUITint.title: Chest UI tint
gmcm.extraFeatures.chestUITint.tooltip: Tint the chest menu background to match the chest's color.
gmcm.extraFeatures.tintChestUI.name: Also apply Chest Tint to UI
gmcm.extraFeatures.tintChestUI.tooltip: When enabled and a chest has a color from the color picker, the chest menu background will be tinted to match.
gmcm.extraFeatures.tintOpacity.name: UI Tint Opacity %
gmcm.extraFeatures.tintOpacity.tooltip: How strong the tint is. 0 = invisible, 100 = fully opaque.
gmcm.extraFeatures.tintPaddingLeft.name: Tint padding left
gmcm.extraFeatures.tintPaddingRight.name: Tint padding right
gmcm.extraFeatures.tintPaddingTop.name: Tint padding top
gmcm.debug.title: Debug
gmcm.debug.tooltip: Enable debug logging to diagnose issues.
gmcm.debug.logging.name: Debug logging
gmcm.debug.logging.tooltip: When enabled, logs detailed chest layout info to the SMAPI console.
